text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is our third summer camp together, and
Admire Vega is determined to train harder than
ever for the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I, on the other hand, am not feeling great. Admire
Vega notices my predicament and advises me to
get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems some of her sisterly kindness is starting
to surface.
